message: Operation 'addProspect' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description is missing. Added details about input schema (ProspectInput), what is returned (created prospect with ID), and side effects (prospect becomes available for sequencing) to enable AI agents to understand the operation's full impact.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new prospect record with the provided information. Accepts a ProspectInput object containing prospect details. Returns the newly created prospect object with assigned ID. The prospect is immediately available for sequencing and engagement. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is missing. Added details about input schema (ProspectInput), what is returned (created prospect with ID), and side effects (prospect becomes available for sequencing) to enable AI agents to understand the operation's full impact.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a prospect record identified by ID. Requires the prospect ID as a path parameter. This operation cannot be undone. Associated prospect data and engagement history will be removed. Requires bearer token authentication.

data.description_suggestion: Adds a prospect to an automated engagement sequence for demand generation. Accepts a request body specifying the prospect ID and sequence ID. Upon successful enrollment, the prospect begins receiving sequence communications according to the sequence schedule. Returns confirmation of sequence enrollment. Requires bearer token authentication.
